message:
refactor(cli): add Ollama agent support, centralize config path resolution, and harden agent type handling

Ollama agent integration:
- Add --ollama flag to spawn and add commands
- Add resolveAddAgentCommandTemplate() for unified agent command resolution
  including Ollama with OLLAMA_HOST environment variable injection
- Add OllamaCount tracking through spawn, add, and analytics paths
- Add canonicalSpawnAgentType() and orderedSpawnAgentTypes() for consistent
  agent type handling in spawn operations
- Add formatSpawnCountSummary() for human-readable agent count display

Config path resolution:
- Add selectedConfigPath() and selectedConfigDir() to root.go, replacing
  scattered config.DefaultPath() calls that ignored --config flag
- Add configPathFromArgs() for early config path extraction before cobra
  parsing (needed for plugin loading during init())
- Add pluginConfigDirForArgs() and pluginAgentsDirForArgs() for init-time
  plugin directory resolution
- Update palette, worktree, plugins, and all config-dependent code to use
  selectedConfigPath() consistently

Palette refactoring:
- Extract paletteConfigContextDir() for session-aware context directory
  resolution with project fallback
- Add loadPaletteRuntimeConfig() and loadPaletteWatchConfig() for
  project-merged config loading
- Add paletteProjectConfigPath(), paletteProjectMarkdownPath(),
  paletteStatePath() for per-concern path resolution
- Add appendPaletteWatchPath() with dedup logic
- Refactor watchPaletteConfig() to accept cwd and use new path helpers

Send command improvements:
- Add matchesLegacySendTypeFilter() using canonical agent type matching
  instead of direct type comparison
- Add isInterruptibleAgentPane() consolidating the agent type check for
  interrupt operations
- Add buildObservedTargetTypes() for analytics event target description
  based on actual delivered panes
- Add normalizeAgentType() for consistent type normalization

Spawn improvements:
- Add appendMissingCountMapAgentSpecs() and appendMissingRecipeAgentSpecs()
  for merging recipe/ensemble agent specs without duplicating existing specs
- Add populateSpawnAgentsFromCounts() and normalizeSpawnOptions()
- Refactor spawn wizard to use canonical agent type resolution

Analytics:
- Add isAnalyticsAgentType() and use comma-delimited token parsing in
  parseTargetTypes() (matching robot/tokens.go refactor)
- Add ollama tracking to aggregateStats() and buildSessionDetails()

Replay:
- Use buildEditorCommandWithFallback() instead of inline editor resolution
- Use matchesLegacySendTypeFilter() for consistent pane matching

Worktree:
- Add loadWorktreeConfig() to reuse already-loaded CLI config
- Fix hardcoded "config.toml" path in auto-provision, status, and clean

Session/zoom:
- Add sessionPanePresentation() and zoomPanePresentation() for consistent
  pane display using theme and icon sets

Validate:
- Expand validation coverage and improve error reporting

New test files: add_test.go, worktree_test.go
Extensive test coverage additions across all CLI subcommands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -586,8 +586,10 @@ func incrementAgentCounts(counts *output.AgentCountsResponse, t tmux.AgentType)
 		counts.Windsurf++
 	case tmux.AgentAider:
 		counts.Aider++
-	default:
+	case tmux.AgentUser:
 		counts.User++
+	default:
+		counts.Other++
 	}
 
 	counts.Total++

@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@ func newScrubCmd() *cobra.Command {
 		Long: `Scan files/directories using the built-in redaction engine and report findings.
 
 By default, this scans common NTM artifact locations:
-  - ~/.config/ntm
+  - The directory containing the active config file
   - ~/.ntm
 
 Output is always redacted (placeholders only). Raw secret matches are never printed.
@@ -113,7 +113,7 @@ Examples:
 		},
 	}
 
-	cmd.Flags().StringArrayVar(&paths, "path", nil, "Path to scan (repeatable). Defaults to ~/.config/ntm and ~/.ntm")
+	cmd.Flags().StringArrayVar(&paths, "path", nil, "Path to scan (repeatable). Defaults to the active config directory and ~/.ntm")
 	cmd.Flags().StringVar(&since, "since", "", "Only scan files modified within this duration (e.g. 1h, 7d)")
 	cmd.Flags().StringVar(&format, "format", "", "Output format: text|json (default: text, or json if --json)")
 
@@ -134,8 +134,8 @@ func resolveScrubRoots(paths []string) ([]string, error) {
 		return uniqueStrings(roots), nil
 	}
 
-	// Default roots: user config dir + ~/.ntm
-	roots = append(roots, filepath.Dir(config.DefaultPath()))
+	// Default roots: active config dir + ~/.ntm
+	roots = append(roots, selectedConfigDir())
 	if ntmDir, err := util.NTMDir(); err == nil {
 		roots = append(roots, ntmDir)
 	}
